${modID}:ExampleCard.NAME: Name
${modID}:ExampleCard.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: This will automatically be used if the card is upgraded. Remove it if unneeded.
EXTENDED_DESCRIPTION: You can put more text in here.
If you need to use it for stuff.
Blizzard is a good example for this.

${modID}:SlaughterDemon.NAME: Slaughter Demon
${modID}:SlaughterDemon.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL If this is the first Attack played in combat, deal !D! more damage.

${modID}:CursedFlow.NAME: Cursed Flow
${modID}:CursedFlow.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. NL If the last card played was an Attack, gain 4 additional Block.

${modID}:MartialArtsMastery.NAME: Martial Arts Mastery
${modID}:MartialArtsMastery.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Draw 1 card. If it is an Attack, gain [E].

${modID}:BlackFlash.NAME: Black Flash
${modID}:BlackFlash.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Gain [E] for each Attack played this turn. NL *black_flash* synergy.

${modID}:CursedEnergyInfusion.NAME: Cursed Energy Infusion
${modID}:CursedEnergyInfusion.DESCRIPTION: Upgrade a card in your hand. NL If Black Flash was played this turn, reduce its cost by 1 for the rest of combat.

${modID}:Cleave.NAME: Cleave
${modID}:Cleave.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Deals 50% additional damage if the enemy has Block. *Shrine*.

${modID}:Spiderweb.NAME: Spiderweb
${modID}:Spiderweb.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage to ALL enemies. Apply !M! Vulnerable to ALL enemies. *Shrine*.

${modID}:DivineFlame.NAME: Divine Flame (Fuuga)
${modID}:DivineFlame.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Deals !M! additional damage for every *Shrine* card played this turn.

${modID}:MalevolentShrine.NAME: Malevolent Shrine
${modID}:MalevolentShrine.DESCRIPTION: At the end of your turn, deal !M! damage to ALL enemies for every card played this turn.
